image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about transcription factors than social media does.
Context visual: Transcription factors are proteins that bind to specific DNA sequences, turning genes on or off.
Escalation visual: Imagine them as the conductors of an orchestra, controlling the symphony of life at a molecular level.
Evidence visual: Research shows that dysregulation of these factors can lead to diseases like cancer.
Payoff visual: So next time you think about your health, remember these tiny but mighty proteins.
Cta visual: Curious about more science secrets? Hit that follow button!
